◎译　　名　当我在夜晚想起德国 / If I Think of Germany at Night
◎片　　名　Denk ich an Deutschland in der Nacht
◎年　　代　2017
◎产　　地　德国
◎类　　别　纪录片
◎语　　言　德语 / 法语
◎上映日期　2017-02-12(柏林电影节)
◎IMDb评分  5.9/10 from 223 users

◎片　　长　105分钟
◎导　　演　罗穆阿德·卡马克 Romuald Karmakar

◎简　　介  

　　A look at five pioneers of electronic musicRicardo VillalobosSonja MoonearAtaRoman FlügelDavid Moufang/Move DIn between eloquent thoughts from the musicians in interviews, quiet observations of them at work at their DJ home, and images of sweating masses at raves, a selective image gradually and very quietly emerges of a music scene in transition.
